data.body: Fix implemented: renamed ci.example.yml -> ci.example.python-poetry.yml, created ci.example.node-npm.yml (copy of NextJS template ci.yml). Added _resolve_stack_ci_example() + _generate_ci_skeleton_from_config() helpers in dso-setup.sh: reads stack= from DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT (or dso-config.conf fallback), selects ci.example.${stack}.yml, generates skeleton from commands.test/lint/format_check if no stack match, falls back to python-poetry for legacy. update-artifacts.sh also stack-aware. Tests: 8/8 new stack-aware (node-npm rejects Python jobs), 79/79 dso-setup regression, 33/33 update-artifacts regression.
